results.question: Which areas had higher agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wages in the first quarter of 1994 than in the first quarter of 1990, and how much did the wage increase?
results.sql:
SELECT 
    t1994.geoid,
    (t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting - t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS wage_increase
FROM 
    t_1994_q1 t1994
JOIN 
    t_1990_q1 t1990 
ON 
    t1994.geoid = t1990.geoid
WHERE 
    t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting

results.question: Which areas increased their agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting establishment count every first quarter from 1990 through 1994?
results.sql:
SELECT t1990.area_fips
FROM t_1990_q1 t1990
JOIN t_1994_q1 t1994 ON t1990.area_fips = t1994.area_fips
WHERE t1994.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > t1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM t_1990_q1 q1_1990
    JOIN t_1990_q2 q2_1990 ON q1_1990.area_fips = q2_1990.area_fips
    JOIN t_1990_q3 q3_1990 ON q2_1990.area_fips = q3_1990.area_fips
    JOIN t_1990_q4 q4_1990 ON q3_1990.area_fips = q4_1990.area_fips
    JOIN t_1994_q1 q1_1994 ON q4_1990.area_fips = q1_1994.area_fips
    WHERE q1_1990.area_fips = t1990.area_fips
      AND (
        q2_1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting <= q1_1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
        OR q3_1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting <= q2_1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
        OR q4_1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting <= q3_1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
        OR q1_1994.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting <= q4_1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
      )
  )
